CustomField.formula: IF(RecordType.DeveloperName ='Solution_Implementation' , Monthly_Customer_Connects__c + Quarterly_Business_Reviews__c + Trainings__c , IF(RecordType.DeveloperName ='Client_Success_Strategist' , Group_Training_Sessions__c + Dedicated_Training_Sessions__c + API_Google_Sheets_Training__c + Insight_Email__c + Deck__c + Product_Configuration__c + Training_Summary__c + Kick_Off_Call__c + Client_Meeting__c + IF(ISNUMBER(Demo__c),VALUE(Demo__c),0) + Data_Success_Taskforce__c + Trial_Group_Training_Sessions__c + Trial_1_1_training_session__c + Trial_API_Google_Sheets_Training__c + Trial_Insight_Email__c + Trial_Deck__c + Trial_Product_Configuration__c + Trial_Trial_Summary_Presentation__c + Excel_Analysis__c + Product_Demo__c + Discovery_Call__c + DAAS_Scoping__c + Advisory_Services_Scoping__c, IF(RecordType.DeveloperName ='Solution_Engineering' , Product_Demo__c + Insight_Email__c + Discovery_Call__c + Client_Meeting__c + Trial_Group_Training_Sessions__c + Trial_1_1_training_session__c + Trial_Insight_Email__c + Trial_Product_Configuration__c + Trial_Trial_Summary_Presentation__c + DAAS_Scoping__c + Advisory_Services_Scoping__c + DaaS_Data_Sample__c + Insight_Deck__c + Pitch_Deck__c + Aligned_Room_Custom__c + Aligned_Room_Template__c + RFP__c + Internal_Meeting__c + Data_Validation__c + Ongoing_Client_Communication__c + Workshop__c ,0 )))
CustomField.label: Sum of Actions
